sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15134" key="a)ristosalpigkth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀριστοσαλπιγκτής</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ᾰρ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>,</foreign> <sense id="n15134.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">best of trumpeters,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:87" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.87</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
